evidence_summary: 299 disappeared tickers; 101 long_inactive (>1000d before end), 194 mid_inactive (>365d), 4 recent (<365d). 251 of 299 (84%) found in DART corp_code.

evidence_summary: 307 tickers reappeared after >90d gap. 12 with name change (potential reuse OR rename). Without delisting/relisting/reuse status source, cannot distinguish reuse from suspension+resume.
repair_effort_estimate: KRX listing status archive = 1-2 weeks
notes: 12 name-change cases priority audit; 295 likely suspension+resume

evidence_summary: 152 tickers had name changes during panel period. Examples: 대림산업->DL, 한국테크놀로지그룹->한국앤컴퍼니, 기아차->기아. DART corp_code 매핑은 ticker level 에서 가능 (corp_code 변경 X 시).
repair_effort_estimate: name_change history table + entity_id linkage = 1 week

evidence_summary: 783 of 833 panel tickers (94%) found in DART corp_code. 50 tickers NOT in DART (외국 ETF / 지주회사 / 합병으로 사라진 entity 가능성).
repair_effort_estimate: KRX permanent_id 또는 ISIN mapping = 1 week
notes: corp_code = good permanent ID candidate; 6% missing requires fallback

evidence_summary: DART 안에서 corp_code <-> stock_code 모두 1:1 매핑 (multi-ticker corp 0, multi-corp ticker 0). Within DART, no code reuse detected.
notes: positive finding within DART scope; KRX 전체 listing 와 mapping 별도 audit 필요

evidence_summary: 833 unique tickers all entered top100 at some point. Panel contains all ever-top100 names. Out-of-top100 rows present (>563 per date avg). Suggests panel preserves disappeared/non-current names = survivorship safer than current-listing-only universe.
tradable=True 17.75%; 82.24% is simply not_in_dynamic_universe. tradable_mask is effectively in_universe + OHLC sanity + limit detection. Not exchange status.
repair_effort_estimate: S3 source + 4-cause attribution function = 2-3 weeks

evidence_summary: STATUS column 이 panel 에 없음. true_suspension classification = 0 건 (priority 분류). 4-cause distinction 핵심 source 부재.
repair_effort_estimate: S3 KRX status source = 1-2 weeks

evidence_summary: 146 of 147 extreme return events (99.3%) flagged as open_limit_move; true KRX limit vs corporate action artifact 구분 불가 (Gate 5 dependency).
repair_effort_estimate: Gate 5 fix 후 corporate action day 제외 logic = 1 week

evidence_summary: volume=0 or NaN = 7,450 rows (0.77%); trade_value=0 or NaN = 7,450 (identical count). 두 변수 same source. close=0 or NaN = 0 (price always present). Zero-volume vs row-absent 명시적 구분 가능 (가격 + 0 volume = 거래정지 candidate, row absent = panel out).
repair_effort_estimate: 4-cause categorical column 추가 = 1 week
notes: positive finding - 0% close missing means strong data integrity

evidence_summary: 258 disappeared tickers; ALL last rows tradable=False (자동 차단됨). 25 of 258 had volume=0 on last row (potential true suspension). 233 had normal volume but disappeared (delisting? merger? panel filter?). 외부 source 필요.
repair_effort_estimate: cross-reference with KR-ID-LIFECYCLE results + KRX delisting archive

evidence_summary: limit_threshold=0.299 (29.9%) aligns with KRX 30% daily price limit rule (~2015 onwards). Pre-2015 KRX limit was 15% (not relevant for panel 2018+).
Panel 의 dynamic_top100 은 외부 source (Kiwoom / KRX) 에서 이미 universe flag 가 적용된 상태로 제공. Repo 안에 generation script 없음.
repair_effort_estimate: rule documented = repo 내 reproduction script 작성 1-2 days

evidence_summary: Dynamic Top100 selection rule = 거래대금추정 (trading value) 상위 100 (100/100 match across 25+ sample dates from 2018-2024). Market cap match = 59/100 average.
notes: Major positive finding: selection rule reproducible from panel data alone

evidence_summary: Per-date top100 100% reproducible from 거래대금추정 ranking. Avg transition count per day = 1-2 new entries (small natural churn).
Panel includes ~563 tickers per date (100 top100 + 463 candidates). Full KRX listed universe per date 별도 source 필요 (전 listed companies vs panel coverage).
repair_effort_estimate: KRX listed companies file = 1 week

evidence_summary: 833 unique tickers all had top100 entry at some point. 299 disappeared during panel = preserved in panel (not removed). Strong survivorship safety evidence.

Top100 membership uses 거래대금추정 (trading value, PIT, 0% estimated). 거래대금추정 = 거래량 × close. Close 가 raw (adjusted X) = split day 에서 trading value 도 왜곡 가능. Top100 membership 이 corp action day 에 false 변동 가능.
repair_effort_estimate: Gate 5 fix 후 trading_value 재계산 = 1 week

evidence_summary: Panel 의 flow fields: 외국인순매매량 (volume), 기관순매매량, 외국인순매수금액추정, 기관순매수금액추정. NaN = 0 in all rows (good integrity).
repair_effort_estimate: vendor doc request = 1 day
notes: Source: Kiwoom REST API per DATA_SOURCES.md

evidence_summary: 10 sample tickers x 14 days 의 외국인순매수금액 sign distribution mixed (+/-). Convention "+" = net buy / "-" = net sell 보임. 단 vendor doc 부재로 100% 확정 어려움.
repair_effort_estimate: KRX 공식 데이터와 1-2 day reconciliation

evidence_summary: Random 1000 row sample: |foreign + institution flow| / trading_value: median 0.14, 95% 0.48, max 0.93. 0 rows > 1.0. Unit consistency 확인 (둘 다 KRW 같음).
Panel 자체에 publication timestamp 없음. DATA_CATALOG.md = "KRX 장마감 후" 라고 표기. T 일 flow 가 정확히 언제 사용 가능한지 (장마감 직후? T+1 시작?) 미확정.
repair_effort_estimate: Kiwoom doc 확인 = 1 day

evidence_summary: NaN flow = 0 across all years. Zero flow = 0.6-4.7% range (2018 institution = 4.7%, others 0.6-2.5%). 2018 outlier may suggest vendor coverage start.
repair_effort_estimate: vendor coverage doc

evidence_summary: 786,608 of 797,206 non-tradable rows (98.7%) have nonzero foreign flow; 775,466 (97.3%) nonzero institution flow. 단 non-tradable 의 dominant cause = panel_absence (universe 밖) 이므로 정상 (그 종목이 universe 밖이어도 거래 자체는 있음). Strategy 진입 X 라 caveat 만 기록.
notes: true suspension 분리 가능 후 재audit

evidence_summary: 수급금액추정여부 = True for ALL 969,208 rows (100%). 즉 모든 flow value 가 추정. 시가총액추정여부 / 거래대금추정여부 와 달리 ALL True. 의미 = 정확한 KRX 공식 flow 가 아니라 vendor (Kiwoom) 의 estimated value. PIT 우려.
repair_effort_estimate: "추정" 의 정확한 의미 vendor 확인 + 필요 시 official KRX 투자자별 거래실적 acquire = 1-2 weeks
notes: CRITICAL — Round 2 finding 잘못 reported (시가총액 0% 와 confused). 실제는 flow 100% estimated.

evidence_summary: F-family (stock ranking flow / RS) 이미 closed. 향후 flow strategy 재개 시 = closed family 재포장 위험 글로벌 REJECT trigger 와 매칭. 구조적 차별성 사전 등록 필수.
